Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Whew... So this is what it's like growing plants.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Oh, should we be measuring the pH of the soil, or monitoring how much sunlight they're getting...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_001_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We don't need to go that far.

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I looked up a bunch of stuff online. I thought it might be helpful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}...Oh, right. I guess we don't have to get so technical for just a rooftop garden.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}When I started looking things up online, I might've gotten a bit carried away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Um... It's like, a measurement of acidity or alkalinity?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Depending on the plants you're growing, the soil needs to be a certain value.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I looked up a bunch of stuff online. I thought it might be helpful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I do like flowers and stuff, but I've never really worked with them outside of arrangements.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I've always wanted to try putting in the work to grow some though![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Oh, sorry. I didn't mean to go on about myself like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Shall we keep working for a bit more? I'll go get some water.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the rooftop planters with Fuuka...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Do you think you could invite me when you tend the plants again?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I'll do more research so I'm in a better position to help out next time too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Huh? There are white spots on the leaves here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}I think I've seen something like this in a book at the library. It might be a common disease in vegetables and flowers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Wh-What do we do, {f 4 1}-kun!? What if the plants die...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_011_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How did the book say to fix it?

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}Y-Yes, you're right. This is exactly what I did all that reading for...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}From what I can tell, it doesn't look too serious yet. If we take care of it now, it should be all right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Wha— Oh, right! If we take care of it now, it might not be a problem.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}From what I can tell, it doesn't look too serious yet. Um, what did the book say...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}The book said if you take care of it right away, they'll get better![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We just need to cut off the white parts, and... That's right, vinegar![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}It said to put some diluted vinegar on the affected areas. I'll go get some from downstairs![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the rooftop planters with Fuuka...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}...I think that's about everything we can do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We've picked up the fallen leaves, and the air circulation is good now too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Everything should be fine now. All that's left is to trust they can recover...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I wouldn't have been able to save the plants if you hadn't been here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I'm still a little worried, but... please let me help out again sometime.[n]{f 1 1}
